title: Expecting empty properties to be returned as null values when updating a MODEL CAR
gherkin:
Given there exists a "MODEL CAR" "F40 Matchbox"
When the user updates the node "F40 Matchbox" with the following data
  | key | value |
  | name | BMW 2002_2 |
  | product_code |       |
  | release_year |       |
  | scale |       |
  | series |       |
Then the response should contain the following properties
  | key | value |
  | name | BMW 2002_2 |
  | product_code |       |
  | release_year |       |
  | scale |       |
  | series |       |
